zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton於1291年7月11日出生在英國素福爾可比爾德斯頓時，他的父親Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton55歲，母親Maude of Poyntz47歲。他於1317年與Joan de  Basing在英國德比夏爾德比德比 聖 阿爾可蒙德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1345年4月9日在英國英格蘭享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton于1291年7月11日出生在英国素福爾可比爾德斯頓时，他的父亲Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton55岁，母亲Maude of Poyntz47岁。他于1317年与Joan de  Basing在英国德比夏爾德比德比 聖 阿爾可蒙德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1345年4月9日在英国英格兰享年53岁。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton was born on 11 July 1291, in Bildeston, Suffolk, England, his father, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, was 55 and his mother, Maude of Poyntz, was 47. He married Joan de  Basing in 1317, in Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 9 April 1345, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton est né le 11 juillet 1291, à Bildeston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Maude of Poyntz, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Joan de  Basing en 1317, à Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1345, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton am 11. Juli 1291 in Bildeston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton 55 und seine Mutter Maude of Poyntz 47. Er hat 1317 in Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England Joan de  Basing geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 9. Lui sposato Joan de  Basing nel 1317, nel Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1345, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Eastonが1291年7月11日にイギリススフォルクビルデストンで生まれた時，父Matthew II de Louvain of Little Eastonは55歳，母Maude of Poyntzは47歳であった。1317年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデルビーデルビー スト アルクムンドでJoan de  Basingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1345年4月9日にイギリスイギリスで53歳で死去した。

ko.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: 영국 더비실르 더비 더비 스트 알크먼드
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton(이)가 1291년 7월 11일 영국 수폴크 빌데스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Maude of Poyntz(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1317년 영국 더비실르 더비 더비 스트 알크먼드에서 Joan de  Basing(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1345년 4월 9일 영국 잉글랜드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton nasceu em 11 de julho de 1291, em Bildeston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Maude of Poyntz, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de  Basing em 1317, em Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1345, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Eng: дирби ст алкмунд, дирби, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Louvain Lord of Little Easton родился 11 июля 1291 г. в местности баилдестон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Matthew II de Louvain of Little Easton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Maude of Poyntz, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de  Basing в 1317 г. в местности дирби ст алкмунд, дирби, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 9 апреля 1345 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

Se casó con Joan de  Basing en 1317, en Derby St Alkmund, Derby, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas.
